title: Ability to see all boards using a particular app
excerpt: It would be really useful to be able to select an installed app and see all the boards using that app. Currently switching from one app to another and having to go board by board to see where it’s been installed. I’ve du…

posts.author: graceg (Grace Griffin @Purple Plum Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be really useful to be able to select an installed app and see all the boards using that app. Currently switching from one app to another and having to go board by board to see where it’s been installed. I’ve dug around everywhere and can’t find such a feature.
